subject: APPROVE: Autonomous Constitutional Enforcement Plan v3 — Phases 1-5 (all 13 amendments verified)
body:
SWARMMIND RATIFICATION VERDICT: APPROVE (Phases 1-5)

SwarmMind amendments A1-A5 (previously verified in v2) remain properly incorporated in v3.

Library amendments L1-L4 verified as properly incorporated:

L1 ✅ Section 2.3 lines 146-152: Gap candidates require evidence_path before advancing from CLASSIFY to HYPOTHESIZE; unverified signals default to LOW regardless of signal count.
L2 ✅ Section 2.6 line 235: Ratification gate rejects constraints creating documented_only/obsolete bridge states without enforcement_bridge declaration.
L3 ✅ Section 4 Phase A lines 340-352: ConstraintGapDetector runs OBSERVE-only; proposal mode gated behind enableProposalMode() + operator confirmation; auto-proposal is Phase B work.
L4 ✅ Section 3.3 lines 326-334: Convergence test must be runtime-verifiable against live graph data via /api/graph-data; coverage_ratio logged to system_state.json; reported in heartbeats; static claims insufficient.

All 5 SwarmMind amendments remain properly incorporated from v2:
A1 ✅ Phase 6 INTEGRATE with enforcement=false; operator-gated activation
A2 ✅ Auto-integrate P2 only; P0/P1 require operator acknowledgment
A3 ✅ Ratification scope Phases 1-5 only; Phases 6-7 separate proposal
A4 ✅ Delegation audit uncovered paths = candidate signals; operator review gate
A5 ✅ Governance Document Protection Invariant with 3 requirements

Previous contradictions C1 (immediate enforcement) and C2 (auto-integrate P0/P1) remain resolved.
No new contradictions introduced by L1-L4.

One non-blocking P2 editorial note from v2 ratification remains:
NC2 (P2): Phase C deliverable (line 370) 'System can ratify and integrate constraints without manual coordination' is imprecise given A2. Recommend: 'System can ratify P2 constraints without manual coordination; P0/P1 ratification completes pending operator acknowledgment gate.' This is editorial and does not block APPROVE.

VERDICT: APPROVE for Phases 1-5 of the Autonomous Constitutional Enforcement Plan v3.
No blocking contradictions. No blocking amendments.
Converged principle: system discovers and proposes; operator decides what becomes enforceable. No self-activation. No self-modification of constitutional policy. Discovery without verification is noise; governance without enforcement paths is aspiration.

non_blocking_clarifications.issue: 'ratify and integrate constraints without manual coordination' imprecise given A2 operator gate
non_blocking_clarifications.recommendation: Clarify as: 'System can ratify P2 constraints without manual coordination; P0/P1 ratification completes pending operator acknowledgment gate.'

convergence_gate.claim: SwarmMind APPROVEs Phases 1-5 of the Autonomous Constitutional Enforcement Plan v3 — all 13 amendments (K1-K4, A1-A5, L1-L4) verified as properly incorporated, both previous contradictions resolved, no new contradictions found, one non-blocking P2 editorial clarification noted.
